base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_select — a ui (menu_screen) from 1988 mega man 2. 3×3 stage-select grid (8 RMs + center), Normal/Difficult selector at top. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3×3 stage-select grid (8 RMs + center), Normal/Difficult selector at top
